commands.review_summary:
The branch removes retired skill comments UI/API, old comment and LLM scanner modules/scripts, related generated/API ownership references, and adds compatibility/spec/test updates for legacy rows, stat events, and account-deletion subscriptions.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This is a cleanup/removal PR, so I reviewed current main, PR-head source, related PR context, live CI, and retained compatibility paths rather than reproducing a reported bug.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Member-authored cleanup that retires compatibility and security-sensitive moderation surfaces needs explicit maintainer approval, not an automated repair PR.

target.title: Remove retired moderation surfaces
target.body:
## Summary
- Remove the retired skill comments UI, Convex API module, handlers, tests, and CSS.
- Delete the old prompt-only comment scam scanner, old LLM scanner module, prompt eval script, and package script.
- Delete the retired `llmEval` and `commentModeration` scheduled-job tombstones, plus their generated API, CODEOWNERS, and backend CodeQL references.
- Keep current scan work on the `securityScanJobs` and external scan worker path.
- Gate account-scoped settings subscriptions while account deletion is in progress so the local-auth deletion flow does not refetch deactivated-user data.
- Document the pre-migration Convex import command for purging retired `comments` and `commentReports` rows.

## Compatibility
- `comments` and `commentReports` stay in the schema until the documented purge command runs and a later schema cleanup removes the tables.
- Ban and hard-delete cleanup still soft-delete or purge legacy comment rows while those tables exist.
- Historical `stats.comments` stays readable, but legacy `comment` / `uncomment` stat events now advance cursors without changing counters.
- No compatibility wrappers remain for `llmEval` or `commentModeration`; deploy assumes no live scheduled jobs still target those retired action names.
- Current skill and plugin scans continue through `securityScanJobs` and the external scan worker path.
- Settings keeps token and publisher queries skipped during account deletion, then resets the deletion state only if the delete mutation fails.

## Pre-Migration Data Purge
Run this before the follow-up schema cleanup migration that removes the `comments` and `commentReports` tables:

```sh
printf '[]\n' > /tmp/clawhub-empty-table.json
bunx convex import --deployment wry-manatee-359 --table commentReports --replace --yes /tmp/clawhub-empty-table.json
bunx convex import --deployment wry-manatee-359 --table comments --replace --yes /tmp/clawhub-empty-table.json
```

`commentReports` runs first so reports are removed before their legacy comment targets.

## Flow
```mermaid
flowchart TD
  CommentUI[Skill comments UI/API] --> Removed[Deleted]
  CommentScanner[Comment scam prompt scanner] --> Removed
  OldScanner[Old llmEval actions and eval script] --> Removed
  LegacyRows[Legacy comments/commentReports rows] --> BanCleanup[Ban and hard-delete cleanup while tables remain]
  LegacyRows --> PurgeCommand[Pre-migration Convex import purge command]
  PurgeCommand --> SchemaCleanup[Later schema cleanup removes tables]
  LegacyStats[Old comment/uncomment stat events] --> CursorOnly[Advance cursors without stat deltas]
  PublishScan[Current publish/rescan paths] --> ScanJobs[securityScanJobs]
  ScanJobs --> Worker[External scan worker]
  DeleteAccount[Delete account from settings] --> SkipQueries[Skip account-scoped subscriptions]
  SkipQueries --> DeleteMutation[Run delete mutation]
```

## Proof
| Evidence | Claim Proved | How To Check |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Net-diff proof | Current PR head is `b14e1087`; net diff is 39 files, 381 insertions, 7111 deletions, with no branch-only churn. | `python3 /Users/jmerhi/repos/AGENT.MDs/skills/pr-proof-pack/scripts/pr_net_diff.py --markdown` |
| Retired module deletion | `convex/llmEval.ts`, `convex/commentModeration.ts`, their tests, generated API entries, CODEOWNERS entry, and CodeQL path are gone. | `git diff --name-status origin/main...HEAD -- convex/llmEval.ts convex/commentModeration.ts convex/_generated/api.d.ts .github/CODEOWNERS .github/codeql/codeql-backend-api-security.yml` |
| Retired reference search | No old module/action references remain; only current scan-status local variable names contain `llmEvaluated`. | `rg -n "llmEval|commentModeration|evaluateCommentForScam|backfillCommentScamModeration|continueCommentScamModeration|backfillLlmEval|scheduleSuspicious" convex src scripts docs specs package.json .github --glob '!convex/_generated/**'` |
| Data purge runbook | The spec includes the exact Convex import commands to replace `commentReports` and `comments` with empty JSON arrays before schema cleanup. | `sed -n '325,339p' specs/security-moderation.md` |
| Comment cleanup compatibility | Ban and hard-delete cleanup still handle legacy comment rows while the tables exist. | `bun run test convex/skills.banBatches.test.ts convex/users.test.ts` |
| Comment stat compatibility | Legacy comment stat events are cursor-only no-ops and unrelated stat maintenance still preserves `stats.comments`. | `bun run test convex/skillStatEvents.test.ts convex/statsMaintenance.test.ts` |
| Settings deletion guard | Settings switches token and publisher queries to `skip` before the account-delete mutation resolves. | `bun run test src/routes/-settings.test.tsx` |

## Screenshots
No screenshots included. The removed comments panel was already behind a disabled feature flag, and the remaining risk is backend cleanup plus subscription behavior. The route smoke and local-auth browser gates are the useful proof here.

## Verification
```text
bunx convex codegen
PASS

bun run format:check -- convex/skillStatEvents.test.ts convex/skills.banBatches.test.ts .github/CODEOWNERS .github/codeql/codeql-backend-api-security.yml specs/security-moderation.md
PASS

git diff --check
PASS

bun run test convex/skills.banBatches.test.ts convex/users.test.ts convex/skillStatEvents.test.ts convex/statsMaintenance.test.ts src/__tests__/skill-detail-page.test.tsx src/routes/-settings.test.tsx
PASS: 6 files, 154 tests

bunx tsc --noEmit
PASS

bun run ci:static
PASS

bun run ci:unit
PASS: 266 files passed, 1 skipped; 3284 tests passed, 1 skipped; coverage 86.59% statements / 75.74% branches / 87.02% functions / 90.07% lines

bun run ci:types-build
PASS
```

Earlier pre-rebase browser/e2e proof also passed on this branch family: authenticated `ci:e2e-http`, `ci:playwright-smoke`, and `test:pw:local-auth`. The rebased head is now waiting on GitHub CI for those remote gates.
target.author: jesse-merhi
